overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban commercial district. The camera follows characters through a covered market area with Japanese-inspired signage, transitions across an outdoor dining plaza with umbrella-shaded tables, and continues along elevated sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers and overpasses. Bright midday sunlight creates strong shadows across the concrete surfaces while neon advertisements and holographic billboards illuminate the cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: exits covered market walkway into open pedestrian plaza with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking past food stalls and Magami Market banners, moving toward the open plaza

notable_agents.action: blonde woman in athletic wear walking ahead through the market

entered.detail: large pink neon advertisement sign mounted on building facade
red and white corporate signage with circular logo
tall red vertical banner with black Japanese text and circular emblem
counter with glass display case and vendor in teal shirt
metal and fabric awning structure providing partial shade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered market walkway with prominent red Magami Market banners and neon signage for Watson Whore and Combat Cab visible ahead. The camera follows a blonde woman walking past a food vendor stall on the right, moving from the sheltered market area toward an open plaza. The ground is paved with large tiles, and the lighting transitions from diffused shade to bright sunlight as the character approaches the plaza exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with umbrella-shaded tables and chairs

events.description: exits outdoor dining plaza onto elevated urban sidewalk alongside traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating between outdoor dining tables and chairs scattered across the plaza

notable_agents.action: woman in business suit looking at phone while walking through the plaza

entered.detail: large teal-colored patio umbrella shading dining tables
white and gray plastic tables arranged for outdoor seating
red and white plastic chairs surrounding the tables
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade rising above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza filled with outdoor dining furniture under large green umbrellas. People are seated at plastic tables eating and conversing. The camera moves through the scattered arrangement of red and white chairs, passing a businesswoman checking her phone. Tall futuristic buildings with glass facades surround the plaza, and the bright midday sun casts sharp shadows across the tiled ground as the character approaches the sidewalk exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban sidewalk with benches and building advertisements

events.description: begins closely following a large pedestrian in a brown jacket walking ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated sidewalk, observing street traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large bald man in brown puffer jacket and green pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: gray concrete seating attached to the building wall
elegant cursive neon sign reading 'Bliss' mounted on building facade
elevated walkway bridge crossing over the street ahead
concrete and metal barrier separating sidewalk from street traffic

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an elevated concrete sidewalk running alongside a busy street, with concrete benches lining the left wall and a road barrier on the right. A prominent 'Bliss' neon sign becomes visible on the left building as the camera follows a large bald man in a brown jacket walking ahead. The pedestrian overpass looms in the distance while sparse traffic moves along the road below, and other pedestrians walk in the same direction along the wide pathway.

events.description: begins descending sloped ramp leading down to lower street level

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloped ramp following a woman with red hair toward the lower level

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and white outfit descending the ramp ahead

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway with metal railings leading downward
thick concrete beams and girders of the pedestrian overpass above

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a descending concrete ramp that narrows as it passes beneath the pedestrian overpass, with the structure's support beams now directly overhead. The lighting becomes more diffused and shadowed under the overpass. The camera follows a woman with red hair down the slope, moving away from the Bliss sign which recedes into the distance. The walkway leads downward toward a lower street level, with building walls closing in on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon market through a sun-drenched plaza and finally down into the shadowed underbelly of a city overpass. It begins in a semi-covered walkway beneath red Magami Market banners, following a blonde woman as the lighting shifts from diffused shade to bright midday sunlight. As the camera emerges into a wide pedestrian plaza, the scene expands across a tiled area filled with green umbrellas and outdoor dining furniture surrounded by towering glass facades. The movement then transitions onto an elevated concrete sidewalk where a Bliss neon sign appears, following a bald man in a brown jacket along a path lined with benches and road barriers. Finally, the camera descends a narrowing concrete ramp, moving beneath the heavy support beams of a pedestrian overpass as the bright sunlight fades back into deep shadow.
